summary: Re-review: all 4 prior WARNs resolved by bert (textMuted, fontSize:11, aria-describedby wired, role=alert durNote). 3 INFO unchanged. No BLOCKs. No new regressions.

steps.viewports_checked: static-analysis-only — no live server per review brief; visual check at 375px still recommended (no regression introduced)
steps.re_review: done — 4 prior WARNs verified resolved; regression scan clean

findings.claim: Range hint color was TH.amberText (semantic misuse for neutral guidance)
findings.evidence: Re-review: line 330 now reads color: TH.textMuted. Confirmed resolved.

findings.claim: Range hint fontSize was 9, below brand minimum
findings.evidence: Re-review: line 330 now reads fontSize: 11. Matches other inline guidance in file (lines 227, 747). Confirmed resolved.

findings.claim: Duration input had no aria-describedby; hint span had no id
findings.evidence: Re-review: line 328 input has aria-describedby="dur-range-hint"; line 330 span has id="dur-range-hint". Values match exactly. Wiring correct per WCAG 1.3.1. Confirmed resolved.

findings.claim: Out-of-range blur-snap was silent with no user feedback
findings.evidence: Re-review: durNote state declared lines 207-209. onBlur line 325 sets durNote to 'Adjusted to 5–480 min range' when typed value is out of range; clears otherwise. Line 331 renders durNote as <div role="alert" style={{ fontSize:11, color: TH.amberText }}>. Correction is non-silent. Amber-for-alert / muted-for-hint semantics are clean and non-conflicting. onChange (line 308) clears note on next keystroke. Confirmed resolved.

findings.claim: 'min' abbreviation is standard and consistent with adjacent fields
findings.evidence: Duration (min) matches Travel before (min) at line 833 and Travel after (min) at line 836. No action needed.

findings.claim: marginLeft:4 on hint span has no visual effect in flex-column parent
findings.evidence: lStyle (line 218) has flexDirection:'column'. marginLeft:4 on the span creates 4px left indent rather than horizontal gap from input. Hint still appears below input and is readable. Cosmetic only. Unchanged from original review.
findings.fix: Visual check to confirm rendering is as intended. No action required.

findings.claim: durDraft useState + useEffect sync is React logic
findings.evidence: Lines 202-205 introduce draft state pattern; correctness is ernie's scope.

refers.why: durDraft useState + useEffect dep-array pattern (lines 202-205) — React logic correctness outside bird scope
